description: {"edges": "Irregular, with some areas appearing scorched or necrotic.", "veins": "Veins are visible but surrounded by chlorotic and necrotic tissue; vein clearing is present."} {"color": "Brown, tan, and greyish-purple.", "shape": "Irregular, blotchy, and expanding. Some lesions appear target-like with concentric rings."} Symptoms are concentrated in the central and upper portions of the leaf, spreading outwards. Lesions are not uniformly distributed.
